trade_plan: Short-term, we recommend a cautious approach, with a focus on buying dips around key support levels. A break below $64,000 could trigger a more significant sell-off. Long-term, we maintain a bullish bias.
Consider a short-term bearish position with a stop-loss above $67,500, targeting $65,000. Alternatively, a neutral strategy focusing on range trading between $65,000 and $69,000 may be more suitable.
